_tuning.hCooling: Heat dissipation per tick. Lower → colder world. Range: 0.8(harsh)–1.0(no cooling)
_tuning.ttlStep: TTL consumed per tick. Higher → shorter lifespans. Default 1
_tuning.deathMinTtl: Node dies when ttl <= this. Raise to kill nodes earlier (0 = natural)
_tuning.deathMinW: Node dies when w <= this. Raise to cull weak nodes faster (0 = natural)

_tuning.surviveTtlRecovery: TTL gained when survive action chosen. Higher → survival is more rewarding
_tuning.surviveDecayReduction: Decay multiplier on survive. Lower → survive slows decay more. Range: 0.9(strong)–1.0(none)
_tuning.surviveHRecovery: Heat recovered when survive chosen. Only h recovery source. Higher → faster recharge cycles
_tuning.surviveWRecovery: Weight recovered when survive chosen. 0 = no w recovery (default). Nonzero → survive also feeds
_tuning.surviveWCost: Weight cost of choosing survive (isolation tax). Nodes that only survive slowly starve. Social w gain offsets this

_tuning.baseCost: h cost per action = intensity(=h) × baseCost. Higher → actions drain faster. survive has no cost (it recovers h instead)
_tuning.reactionCost: h cost for target reacting = target.h × reactionCost. ignore=0 (free). retaliate most expensive

_tuning.neighborLimit: Top-K cosine neighbors for Environment computation. Lower → more isolated. Higher → more social
_tuning.signalExtraReach: Extra candidates for signal action, scaled by intensity. Effective reach = neighborLimit + floor(h × signalExtraReach). 3 → max 8 at full h
_tuning.resonanceDecay: Resonance decay per tick. Carries over across ticks. 0.8 = 20% fade per tick. Lower → faster forget. Higher → longer memory
_tuning.targetAffinity: Action-based target.w bias. score × (1 + affinity × target.w). Positive → prefer healthy targets (signal: accept-likely). Negative → prefer weak targets (merge: absorb, bequeath: aid)

_tuning.initialH: Starting heat. Higher → newborns are vigorous. Lower → born cold, survive-biased
_tuning.initialW: Starting weight. Higher → more buffer before starvation. Lower → fragile newborns

_tuning.halfLifeHours: Time decay half-life. Higher → older nodes retain more fitness
_tuning.dimensions: Fitness dimension weights. Sum should be ~1.0
_tuning.hungerThresholds: Population size ranges for pruning ramp
_tuning.speciesProtection: Minimum member count before pruning applies
_tuning.blendRatio: Species profile blend: self vs global average

_tuning.temperature: Softmax temperature for action/reaction selection. Lower → more decisive (greedy). Higher → more exploratory. 1.0=standard, 0.5=sharp, 2.0=random

_tuning.enabled: Master switch. false = no frustration (memoryless Markov as before)
_tuning.decay: Per-tick exponential decay of frustration. 0.7 = 30% loss per tick. Lower → faster forget. Higher → longer memory
_tuning.accum: Accumulation rate for new frustration from unfulfilled actions. 0.1 = thin layer. Higher → stronger carryover
_tuning.blend: How much frustration modifies feelings before action selection. 0.15 = 15% influence. Higher → frustration dominates

_tuning.enabled: Master switch. false = no self-reflection (action outcomes don't feed back into feelings)
_tuning.blend: How much selfReflection modifies feelings before next action selection. 0.3 = 30% influence. Stronger than frustration (0.15) — two worlds' experience deserves weight
_tuning.decay: Per-tick exponential decay. 0.8 = 20% loss per tick. Slower than frustration (0.7) — reflection lingers longer

_tuning.rate: Base learning rate for learnedDelta updates. Higher → faster adaptation. 0.05 = moderate
_tuning.deltaClamp: Max absolute value per cell in learnedDelta. 0.5 = effective personality range 0.5×–1.5× base. Safety net only
_tuning.blendAlpha: Species delta blend ratio. 0.7 = 70% self + 30% all-species mean. Lower → more homogeneous across species
_tuning.deltaDecay: Per-digest exponential decay rate for learnedDelta. 0 = disabled. 300b training is the sweet spot; longer runs cause anchor monoculture regardless of decay rate

_tuning.minContents: Minimum contents.length to be spawn-eligible. Knowledge gate — 4 = 1-2 merges required
_tuning.minFitness: Minimum fitness score to spawn. Health gate — 0.4 = moderately healthy required
_tuning.minResonance: Minimum total resonance sum. Maturity gate — 0.3 = at least 1 successful social exchange (signal+accept boost=0.3)
_tuning.minPartnerSimilarity: Minimum cosine similarity with partner. Compatibility gate — only breed with related content. 0.5 = moderate relatedness
_tuning.childTtlRatio: Fraction of species default TTL given to children. 0.5 = half lifespan start
_tuning.blendMode: Personality blend strategy. 'same' = both children get identical blend (ratioA). 'cross' = child A gets parentB-dominant personality, child B gets parentA-dominant (genetic crossover)

_tuning.proximityThreshold: Cosine similarity above which proximity merge triggers unconditionally. 0.75 = semantically redundant neighbors. mergeTargetBias=0 species are immune
_tuning.minSimilarity: Minimum cosine similarity for intentional merge action. Below this, merge target is too distant — action falls back to survive. 0.5 = moderate semantic relatedness required

_tuning.intervalTicks: Collect ecosystem snapshot every N ticks. 10 = moderate granularity
_tuning.bufferSize: Max snapshots in ring buffer. 50 × 10 ticks = 500 ticks of history
_tuning.minPopulation: Skip snapshot when population below this. Low-pop data is noise

_tuning._frame: All pcts here are relative to the ACTUAL run length (harvestTick = targetTicks × harvestPct), not targetTicks. Semantics stay stable across FILTER_HARDNESS levels
_tuning.earlyPct: Max tick% for 'early' death (redundant only). 0.4 = first 40% of the run
_tuning.lonerPct: Max tick% for loner detection. 1.0 = up to harvest (whole run). Loners need the full window because flat initial metrics let them survive long before dying isolated
_tuning.minCosine: Merge cosine threshold for redundancy flag. 0.75 = moderate similarity
_tuning.posResThreshold: Max positive resonance to be a loner. 0.05 = near-zero social interaction
_tuning.redundantCosine: Merge cosine above which death is redundant, not loner. Should match minCosine
_tuning.wThreshold: Deprecated — merger cluster no longer gates on w
_tuning.maxDepth1: Deprecated — merger cluster no longer caps depth-1 count
_tuning.clusterPct: Tick% of the run at which to snapshot for cluster detection. 0.7 = past the merge-chain peak, before late-game dissolution (tuned 2026-03-14). Clamped to harvestTick-1
_tuning.clusterMinCos: Min merge cosine for valid cluster member. Below = noise (unrelated merge)
_tuning.clusterMaxCos: Max merge cosine for valid cluster member. Above = proximity merge (redundant duplicate)

receptor._note_signalAcceptWBoost: DEPRECATED: now per-species in species.json. This global value is ignored.

_tuning.signalAcceptBoost: Resonance gained on signal+accept. Higher → signaling is more rewarding
_tuning.signalAcceptWBoost: Weight gained by both parties on signal+accept. Social nourishment — makes signaling species sustainable
_tuning.signalHeatBoost: Heat gained on signal+accept. Higher → social activity warms nodes
_tuning.rejectHeatPenalty: Heat lost on rejection. Higher → rejection is more costly
_tuning.retaliateDecayIncrease: Decay increase on retaliation. Higher → retaliation is dangerous
_tuning.mergeWeightTransfer: Fraction of initiator weight transferred to target on merge. Scaled by similarity — close merge is efficient, distant is lossy
_tuning.mergeTtlTransfer: Fraction of initiator TTL added to target on merge. Scaled by similarity — close merge is efficient, distant is lossy
_tuning.mergeResonanceTransfer: Fraction of initiator's positive resonance transferred to target on merge. Scaled by intensity × similarity. 0.5 = half of accumulated social history carries over
_tuning.bequeathTtlRatio: Fraction of initiator TTL gifted to target on bequeath+accept. Initiator loses TTL, target gains it
_tuning.bequeathDecayReduction: Target decay multiplier on bequeath+accept. Lower → stronger decay relief. 0.95 = 5% decay reduction
_tuning.ignoreResonanceFade: Resonance penalty for initiator when ignored. Mild — makes ignore not truly free for initiator's learning
_tuning.similarityResonanceBonus: Cosine similarity multiplier for resonance on signal+accept. sim=0.8 → resonance ×1.4. Rewards good vector matching (spore benefits most via high resonanceSensitivity)

_tuning.bias: Max ±bias on baseline w/h/d from engram metrics. 0.3 = ±30%
_tuning.weightSaturation: Denominator for tanh(weight/N) in w bias. 3 = saturates at ±3 engram weight
_tuning.hitCountCap: Denominator for min(hitCount/N, 1) in h/d bias. 5 = caps at 5 recall hits
_tuning.fixedBonus: Bonus for status=fixed engram nodes: +N% w, −N% d. 0.15 = ±15%
_tuning.external: Universal loader fuel intake: payload.weight in [weightMin,weightMax] maps linearly to initialW × [wScaleMin,wScaleMax]. Clamped. 0.3 = dies without social action, 1.5 = comfortable but not dominant. Nodes with external weight skip consensus jitter

_tuning.harvestPct: Tick% at which to judge survival. Same ecosystem, different observation point
_tuning.soft: 30% — early snapshot, many still alive → coarse filter, more output
_tuning.hard: 90% — late snapshot, only the strongest remain → strict filter, minimal output
